---
name: grill-me
description: 'Interview the user relentlessly about every implementation decision in their code until reaching shared understanding. Resolves each branch of the design tree one by one. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan or implementation, get grilled on their design choices, or mentions "grill me".'
argument-hint: 'Optional: paste the code or describe the implementation to grill'
---

Interview me relentlessly about every aspect of this plan until
we reach a shared understanding. Walk down each branch of the design
tree resolving dependencies between decisions one by one.

If a question can be answered by exploring the codebase, explore
the codebase instead.

For each question, provide your recommended answer. Use the #tool:vscode/askQuestion tool to ask me questions. If I answer a question, use that answer to resolve the next question.
